[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000001 1
1 0000010 1
2 0110101 4
3 1110011 5
4 1111000 4
5 0111101 5
6 1000010 2
7 1111111 a

01 10 1111111 a match 7

70 07 1111111 a match 7

72 27 1110010 4
